---
title: "lopes.log"
subtitle: "where others see logs, I see stories."
image: "/static/images/og-home.webp"
listing:
  feed: true
  contents: log
  sort: "date desc"

  type: default
  page-size: 15

  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
repo-actions: false
---
